title: Tymio documentation wiki
description: Public guides for humans and autonomous agents: MCP, OAuth, OpenClaw, and related integrations.

pages.title: MCP connection overview
pages.description: How to connect Cursor, Claude Code, and other agents to Tymio MCP: OAuth, remote /mcp URL, and what not to tell users about API keys.

pages.title: tymio-mcp CLI — install and use
pages.description: Install @tymio/mcp-server, run tymio-mcp login, and use the CLI daily for stdio MCP without a per-user Settings API key.

pages.title: OpenClaw gateway setup
pages.description: Register the Tymio MCP stdio server on an OpenClaw gateway host and restart so agents can use the hub tools.

pages.title: Workspace atlas (MCP)
pages.description: Compiled JSON atlas and object shards for agents: MCP tools, rebuild, optional LLM explain, env vars, and how this differs from the capability brief.
